name: Section 382 Limitation Increase for Recognized Built-in Gains

eligibility.description: The corporation must have a net unrealized built-in gain (NUBIG) at the time of the ownership change that exceeds a specific threshold (15% of asset value or $10M).

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Increases the annual Section 382 limitation by the amount of recognized built-in gains (RBIG) during the 5-year recognition period, allowing faster utilization of restricted NOLs.
